channel.title: Console on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Console on Arrans github.io

item.title: ranger/ranger
item.description: A VIM-inspired filemanager for the console

item.title: microsoft/terminal
item.description: The new Windows Terminal and the original Windows console host, all in the same place!

item.title: alecthomas/chroma
item.description: A general purpose syntax highlighter in pure Go

item.title: pterm/pterm
item.description: ✨ #PTerm is a modern Go module to easily beautify console output. Featuring charts, progressbars, tables, trees, text input, select menus and much more 🚀 It’s completely configurable and 100% cross-platform compatible.

item.title: leo-arch/clifm
item.description: The shell-like, command line terminal file manager: simple, fast, extensible, and lightweight as hell.

item.title: amanusk/s-tui
item.description: Terminal-based CPU stress and monitoring utility

item.title: Delta456/box-cli-maker
item.description: Make Highly Customized Boxes for CLI
